purpose: Prevent concurrent chats from mutating the same OS/repo paths without explicit conflict packets.

stale_lease_policy.recovery_requires: write stale lease event and conflict-safe continuation receipt

path_scope_rules.global_state_policy: use append-only event fan-in; compactor updates global state under single compaction lease
path_scope_rules.os_path_policy: lease exact directories when mutating; read-only operations do not require lease
